data.title: HitIQ Limited Announces Entitlement Issue to Raise $2.92 Million
data.description:
Protect Your Portfolio Against Market Uncertainty

  • Discover companies with rock-solid fundamentals in TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter.
  • Receive undervalued stocks, resilient to market uncertainty, delivered straight to your inbox.

HitIQ Limited ( (AU:HIQ) ) has issued an announcement.

HitIQ Limited has announced a non-renounceable entitlement issue, offering one share for every three shares held at $0.022 per share, along with free new options to raise up to $2.92 million. This move, partially underwritten by GBA Capital Pty Ltd, aims to strengthen the company’s financial position and support its strategic initiatives, potentially impacting its market presence and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about HitIQ Limited

HitIQ Limited operates in the technology industry, focusing on developing and providing advanced concussion management solutions. The company is known for its innovative products that aim to improve player safety in sports through data-driven insights and monitoring systems.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Cyviz AS Reports Strong Q1 2025 Growth Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Cyviz AS ( (DE:8P9) ) has provided an update.

Cyviz AS reported a strong first quarter of 2025 with a 27.4% increase in revenue to NOK 135.8 million and a 23% rise in order intake to NOK 112.4 million, despite market challenges such as falling oil prices and new US tariffs. The company achieved a significant milestone by securing its first customer agreement for a new software platform, aligning with its strategy to scale through partners and boost recurring revenue. Despite a decrease in EBITDA and negative cash flow, Cyviz remains optimistic about continued growth, particularly in Europe and NATO countries, and aims to achieve a 25% recurring revenue and EBITDA margin within five years.

More about Cyviz AS

Cyviz is a global technology provider specializing in comprehensive conference and control rooms, as well as command and experience centers. Established in 1998, the company serves global businesses and governments with high demands for user-friendliness, decision support, security, and quality. Cyviz is known for its platform that manages and controls systems and resources across enterprises, making it a preferred choice for customers with complex needs. The company is listed on Euronext Growth on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 8,532

Current Market Cap: NOK375.9M

For detailed information about 8P9 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: lastminute.com Reports Strong Q1 2025 Performance
data.description:
Protect Your Portfolio Against Market Uncertainty

  • Discover companies with rock-solid fundamentals in TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter.
  • Receive undervalued stocks, resilient to market uncertainty, delivered straight to your inbox.

lastminute ( (CH:LMN) ) has shared an announcement.

lastminute.com has reported a strong start to 2025 with positive Q1 results, driven by improved pricing strategies in the Flights segment and robust performance in its core Packages segment. The company saw a 14% increase in revenues compared to Q1 2024, with significant growth in both Packages and Flights. The strategic investments in Tier 2 markets, particularly in the Nordics and Benelux, have shown early positive results, aligning with the company’s roadmap to strengthen market position and brand visibility. This performance reinforces confidence in achieving low double-digit growth in revenues and adjusted EBITDA for the full year 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:LMN) stock is a Buy with a CHF27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on lastminute stock, see the CH:LMN Stock Forecast page.

More about lastminute

lastminute.com is a European Travel-Tech leader specializing in Dynamic Holiday Packages. The company aims to simplify, personalize, and enhance the travel experience for customers using its technology. As a fully licensed European tour operator, lastminute.com offers a wide range of real-time travel combinations through its proprietary Dynamic Holiday Packaging engine, providing additional customer protection and exclusive deals. The company is publicly traded on the SIX Swiss Exchange under the ticker symbol LMN.

Average Trading Volume: 6,964

Current Market Cap: CHF152.6M

Bando Chemical Industries Ltd. ( (JP:5195) ) has provided an announcement.

Bando Chemical Industries, Ltd. announced a significant discrepancy in its consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, compared to the previous year. The company reported an increase in revenue but a substantial decrease in profits due to impairment losses related to a consolidated subsidiary, impacting its financial performance and potentially affecting stakeholder confidence.

Bando Chemical Industries, Ltd. operates in the chemical industry and is known for its production of industrial rubber products, including belts and hoses, with a focus on serving various industrial sectors.

data.title: Australian Inflation Expectations Rise, Stock Market Braces
data.description:
Today, the Consumer Inflation Expectation for May in Australia was released, revealing a figure of 4.1%. This result surpassed the anticipated estimate of 3.8% but showed a slight decrease from the previous month’s figure of 4.2%. The data suggests that inflation expectations among consumers remain elevated, albeit with a minor decline from April.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The higher-than-expected inflation expectation could have significant implications for the Australian stock market. Investors might become cautious, anticipating potential interest rate hikes by the Reserve Bank of Australia to combat inflation. This could lead to increased volatility in the stock market as traders adjust their portfolios in response to the changing economic landscape. Companies with high debt levels might face pressure, while those with strong pricing power could benefit in an inflationary environment.

data.title: Spain’s Inflation Holds Steady: Market Implications
data.description:
Spain’s Harmonised Inflation Rate for April was released today, showing no surprises as it matched the forecasts. The year-on-year rate stood at 2.2%, consistent with both the previous month’s figure and the anticipated estimate. This stability in inflation suggests a period of economic steadiness, at least in terms of consumer prices.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

For stock market enthusiasts, this steady inflation rate might signal a period of calm, as it indicates that consumer prices are not experiencing unexpected fluctuations. This could lead to a stable environment for businesses, potentially encouraging investment. However, investors should remain vigilant, as other economic factors could still influence market dynamics. Overall, the unchanged inflation rate may provide a reassuring backdrop for those involved in the Spanish stock market.

data.title: WOWOW INC. Reports 2025 Financial Results with Increased Sales but Decreased Profit
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Quickly and easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from WOWOW INC. ( (JP:4839) ).

WOWOW INC. reported its consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, showing a 2.5% increase in net sales to ¥76,757 million. Despite the rise in sales, the profit attributable to owners of the parent decreased by 41.6% to ¥637 million, reflecting challenges in maintaining profitability. The company plans to maintain its dividend payout, indicating a commitment to returning value to shareholders despite the current financial pressures.

More about WOWOW INC.

WOWOW INC. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, primarily engaged in the entertainment industry, offering broadcasting services and content distribution.
